hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath' | { read -r f; rel="${f#/Users/xpagency/Desktop/tooney-kids-theme/}"; cd /Users/xpagency/Desktop/tooney-kids-theme && git checkout -B claude-changes 2>/dev/null && git add "$rel" && git commit -m "Update $rel" 2>/dev/null && git push origin claude-changes 2>/dev/null && gh pr create --title "Claude changes" --body "Automated changes by Claude — please review and merge." --base main --head claude-changes 2>/dev/null || true; } || true
